retry_reason: The free functions always succeed (void) and there is no failure path; retry is neither possible nor meaningful.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper that releases the references held on the streamcipher and blockcipher objects in the adiantum_tfm context. It is called during tfm destruction. The call is unconditional and void-returning; the caller must ensure the context is valid. After this call, the tfm context must not be used. There is no error path and no reference is returned to the caller.
